title: 9 Tinctures for Smokers to Cure Inflamed Gums
description: Aloe barbadensis tinctures are used to help with inflamed gums. The aloe vera plant, from which the tincture is made, contains properties like vitamins A, C, and E, and minerals like calcium and potassium. These constituents help reduce inflammation and fight bacteria that cause gum infections. The aloe vera's anti-inflammatory properties, specifically its high levels of polysaccharides, also help soothe and calm irritated gums.  To use aloe barbadensis tincture for inflamed gums, plac...
